titleStmt.title: SII 24.100: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 100. (A.R. No. 123 of 1947-48.) III PRĀKĀRA, NORTH WALL.

summary.p: Records a sale of land to Tirumaḻavāḍi-uḍaiyāṉ alias Rājavallabha-Pallavaraiyaṉ under orders from Adhikārigaḷ Nittaviṉōdamuḍai ••••• for payment of a specified quantity of paddy to the temple. The inscription is dated in the 44th regnal year of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pukaḻ mātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpa nilamakaḷ nilava malaimakaḷ puṇara [ Urimaiyiṟ ciṟan=ta maṇimuṭi cūṭi mī]
ṉavar nilaikeṭa villavar kulaitara Eṉai mannavar Iṉiyaluṟṟuḻitara tikkaṉaittum tan cakkaranaṭātti vīrasiṅhāsanattu Avanimuḻutu
ṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟirun=taruḷiya kovirājakeca(keca)ripanmarāṉa cakkaravattikaḷ śrī (y)kulottuṅkacoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 4 10 4 Āvatu pāṇṭi
kulācanivaḷanāṭṭu viḷānāṭṭu tiruvaraṅkattāḻvār koyilukku śrīykāriyañ ceykiṟa Atikārikaḷ nitta viṉotamu
vaiyiṣṇavavāriyam tiruvaraṅkappiccarum tiruveṅkaṭap piccarum ciy puṇṭarika nampiyum tiruvaraṅkadāsarum Ippaṇṭāravāriyam Āritan
tāyan cirāman Ārāvamutum kecavan taniyiḷañciṅkamum
ttukku puncai varicai veli Onṟukku Irājakecariyāl nel Eṇkalamāka van=ta nellai śrī paṇṭāratte Iṟai mikuti koṇṭu tirumaḻapāṭi Uṭai
yān tiru[ nan=tavanam] ceyyakkaṭavarākavum Innilam tirumaḻapāṭi Uṭaiyān ṉaippeṟuva koṇṭu I
ttirunan=tavānam Irāja Ivar varkattārume pperuvārākavum Ippaṭi sammatittu Innila
kalamuṭaiyān tirumaḻavāṭi vuṭaiyānāna Irājavallapa pallavaraiyaṟku Āḻvār kanmikaḷom Ippaṭikku Ivai
koyiṟ kaṇakku Āritan Ampalak kūttanāna nānūṟṟu Ippaṭikku Ivai śrīvaiṣṇava piriyaneḻuttu Itu tiruvaraṅkap piccar
Ivai vaṭakopuramuṭaiyān Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai tiruveṅkaṭa piccaneḻuttu śrī nampi Eḻuttu tiruvaraṅkadāsaneḻuttu
Ippaṭikku Ivai
Āritan Ārāvamutu
puṇṭirikan neḻuttu
Ippaṭi Aṟiven Ā
ritan kecuvan tani
iḷacciṅkatti neḻu
ttu Ippaṭikku Ivai pāratāyan ci
rāman Ārāvamutin Eḻuttu Ippaṭik
ku Ivai kāśiyapan ciṅkan tiruvaraṅkanārāyaṇaneḻuttu pāratāyan kecavan Aṟi
variyāneḻuttu Itu pāratāyan tiruve
ṅkaṭavan ciṅkappirān sa[ jñai] yātanaContinuation lost.
Digital edition of SII 24.100 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
